name: Maria T.
text: Jerry was amazing to work with. No games, no hidden fees. Got metal plates on the spot and drove home same day.

name: David K.
text: Best car buying experience I've ever had. Jerry inspects every car himself and the prices are honest. Highly recommend Maxim Autos.

name: Sandra P.
text: Came in after a bad experience at another dealer who tried to sneak in hidden fees. Jerry at Maxim was the complete opposite — transparent pricing, no surprises.
